remarks: Step into a world where your backyard is the open water, offering immediate, private access to the Long Island Sound right from your doorstep in the desirable, gated enclave of Charles Cove. This stunning, completely remodeled townhome offers more than just a place to live-it's a lifestyle that makes you feel like you're on a permanent vacation. With captivating views of Charles Creek, you'll enjoy a front-row seat to coastal beauty and the vibrant 4th of July fireworks right from your private decks. Inside, the sun-drenched, open floor plan is designed for effortless entertaining and relaxation, featuring brand new coastal decor. The primary suite is a true sanctuary, boasting its own waterfront balcony and a spa-like bath complete with a luxurious freestanding tub and walk-in shower. For those seeking flexibility, the third-floor loft serves as the perfect home office, gym, or media lounge. Living here means enjoying top-tier amenities including a pool, tennis, pickleball courts and dock rental options. Practicality meets luxury with an attached garage and ample guest parking. When you're ready to explore, you're just moments away from the energy of SoNo, with its world-class restaurants, the SoNo Collection, and the Maritime Center. This is coastal living at its finest-a rare opportunity to embrace a waterfront retreat with every convenience at your doorstep.
